flavor_text: A cinder wand that sparks more than it obeys.
The grain hums faintly under uncertain incantations.
Its tip spits embers and petty spite.
Bound in ash thread and apprentice mistakes.
Clouded crystal that feeds on careless focus.
A lean staff fit for hedge rites and ward circles.
Runes etched shallow yet eager to wound.
Wax seals melt when the spellwork turns severe.
Cut from a tree that never saw noon.
A dim shard that remembers older constellations.
Its pulse steadies rites that would break lesser minds.
Each sigil darkens after a successful invocation.
Light bends around its core and vanishes.
Kept by magi tasked with ending cursed bloodlines.
A midnight conduit that devours stray sparks.
Its crown blooms when enemies forget their names.
An eclipsed shard that answers only firm command.
Arcane wake trails behind every spoken glyph.
Dark petals unfold when a duel nears its end.
A high staff that tolls unseen bells through marrow.
Sanctified ash burns brighter in forbidden rites.
Whispers gather at its tip before the cast.
A prophetic stave that splits fate in two.
Its halo drowns torches and courtly lies alike.
A sovereign conduit for spells that level citadels.
